full_text:
Wang Shi (Yiqiang) 王士 (義強)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Shi (王士), styledYiqiang (義強), was born in Qi in Guanghan. Second cousin of Wang Fu. Died in the Nanman campaign. Wang Shi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Wang Shi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
